mobile.title: Mobile — client app (F2)
mobile.hint: ScreenHead · BottomNav (account/case) · BottomSheet · Confetti · Tutorial · SignaturePad · FABs (DOC-01 §5.2). Switch to «Surface: Client» above.
mobile.screenHeadSub: Everything we can do for your family.
mobile.sheetBody: It's a process that helps minors under court protection regularize their status. We explain it in plain language.
mobile.tutorialB1: Tap «Continue» to upload your documents. I'll guide you every step.
mobile.tutorialB2: Every time you finish something, we celebrate together.
mobile.tutorialB3: If you have questions, tap «Your team» at the bottom left.

welcome.title: Welcome to your portal
welcome.subtitle: Follow your case step by step, with your team always close by.

noAccess.title: Let's talk first
noAccess.body: We activate your portal access once you start your case with us. Reach out and we'll give you your login details.

website.title: See our services
website.sub: Everything we do for your family

noAccess.escape: I have my details → View my case

phone.title: Enter with your phone
phone.body: Use the same number you used for your contract. We already have it on file — that's your key to your case.
phone.trustBadge: We recognize your number and open your case instantly.
phone.footerBadge: Only you can see your case.
phone.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
phone.errorInvalidPhone: The phone number is not valid. Please check and try again.
phone.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

otp.title: Enter your code
otp.bodyPrefix: We sent a 6-digit code via SMS to
otp.footerBadge: We verify it's you to protect your case.
otp.errorCode: That code doesn't match. Try again, no rush.
otp.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.

home.subtitle: Here are your active cases.
home.noCases: You have no active cases at this time.

servicios.title: Our services
servicios.subtitle: Everything we can do for you and your family.

servicioDetalle.whatIsFallback: It is a process that helps you regularize your situation safely. We explain everything in plain language, no complicated words.
servicioDetalle.benefit1: We review your case and tell you if you qualify, no commitment.
servicioDetalle.benefit2: We prepare and file all your forms for you.
servicioDetalle.benefit3: We guide you every step, in your language.
servicioDetalle.costsNote: Timing and costs are confirmed in your consultation, based on your case.

disclaimer.title: Before we begin
disclaimer.subtitle: Read this notice to the end and sign to open your case.
disclaimer.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to continue

section1.title: 1. Nature of the service
section1.body: UsaLatinoPrime assists you in preparing and filing your immigration process. We do not guarantee a specific outcome, as the final decision rests with the authorities (USCIS, courts and other entities).

section2.title: 2. Truthful information
section2.body: You agree to provide true and complete information and documents. Providing false data can seriously affect your case and is your responsibility.

section3.title: 3. Protection of your data
section3.body: Your information is stored securely and used only to manage your case. We do not share it with third parties except when the process requires it before the relevant authority.

section4.title: 4. Communication
section4.body: Your team's recommendations do not constitute an absolute legal guarantee. Authority response times are beyond our control.

section5.title: 5. Payments
section5.body: Fees and the payment plan are governed by your contract. Official government fees are non-refundable once filed.

disclaimer.closing: By signing this notice you confirm you have read it and agree to these conditions to open your case in the portal.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the notice. My signature is valid to open my case.
disclaimer.errGeneric: We couldn't save your signature. Try again, no rush.

camino.nextDocsBody: It's quick: take a photo and we turn it into a PDF.
camino.nextFormBody: Answer a few questions in your own words.

tutorial.step1Body: Tap “Continue” to upload your documents. I'll guide you every step — don't worry.
tutorial.step2Body: Every time you finish something, we celebrate together. You'll see your case move forward.
tutorial.step3Body: If you have questions, tap “Your team” at the bottom left. Real people reply whenever you need.

documentos.title: My Documents
documentos.subtitle: Upload the ones for your {phase} phase. Scanned PDF only (no photos).
documentos.tip: Tip: use the camera to scan. Lex shows you how.
documentos.emptyBody: Your team is preparing your case. We'll let you know as soon as there's something for you.

subir.captureSub: Place the sheet on a table, with good light.
subir.uploadingSub: One moment, we're saving it securely.
subir.errPdfOnly: We only accept scanned PDFs. Please try again with a PDF.
subir.errTooBig: The file is too large. Try a smaller one.
subir.errNetwork: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.

exito.title: You did it, {name}!
exito.body: Your document was sent. Your attorney will review it soon.

corregir.reasonFallback: It looks blurry. Please rescan it.
corregir.empathy: You did nothing wrong. We'll fine-tune it together.

proceso.title: Your process is moving, {name}
proceso.subtitle: You're in Phase {x} of {y}. You're doing great.
proceso.whatsNextBody: Your team is working on your case. We'll let you know as soon as there's news.

bitacora.title: Case history
bitacora.subtitle: Everything is recorded here, with date and time.

mas.myProcessDesc: See what stage you are in
mas.caseHistoryDesc: Everything that happened, with date and time
mas.myFilesDesc: Documents your team uploaded for you

historia.placeholderBody: Here you'll be able to tell us your story in your own words. We're finishing this space for you.

login.title: Team Panel
login.subtitle: Exclusive access for UsaLatinoPrime employees.
login.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Enter your email and we'll send instructions if it belongs to an active employee.
resetPassword.successMessage: If the email belongs to an active employee, you'll receive instructions shortly.

cambiarPassword.title: Create your password
cambiarPassword.body: This is your first access. Choose a secure password to protect your account.
cambiarPassword.requirements: At least 12 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
cambiarPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
cambiarPassword.errorTooWeak: This password is too easy to guess. Try a more varied combination.

stub.comingSoon: This section will be available soon.

dashboard.sub: Here's what's happening in your business today.
dashboard.comingSoon: This section is completed in the next wave.

activityEmpty.title: No activity in this period yet
activityEmpty.sub: Change the range or create your first service to start seeing movement here.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.sub: What your business sells, as configuration — never as code.
catalog.emptySub: Create your first service and sell it today — no developers.
catalog.bannerProd: You're editing a live service: text changes are reflected immediately in the client app.
catalog.archiveConfirmBody: The service will no longer be contractable and will be hidden from the editor. Ongoing cases are unaffected.
catalog.slugLocked: The identifier cannot change: cases already exist for this service.
catalog.entryToggle: It's an entry to another service's phase
catalog.entryNote: The entry service has its own phases, documents, forms and prices — independent of the parent.
catalog.lawyerNote: Automatically enables the legal validation flow for cases that contract it.
catalog.priceNote: Changing the price doesn't affect already signed contracts.
catalog.apptNote: It's the default for new cases; each case can have its own override.
catalog.formStubSub: The form editor (official PDF and AI generation) arrives in phase F4.
catalog.celebrate: 🎉 {service} is now live. Clients see it in the app and Vanessa can create contracts — no deploy needed.
catalog.ackWarning: I understand and want to publish anyway

employees.title: Employees
employees.sub: Your team and what each person can see and do.
employees.emptySub: Create your first employee and invite them to the panel.
employees.emailTaken: An employee with this email already exists.
employees.presetSales: Access to leads, calendar, clients and sales metrics.
employees.presetParalegal: Access to cases, expedientes, validations and calendar.
employees.presetFinance: Access to payments, collections, accounting and printing.
employees.inviteSent: Invitation sent to {email}. The employee will set their password from the email.
employees.matrixHeader: Roles are a starting point, not a limit: you can grant any employee any module.
employees.adminRowNote: Administrators have full access; the matrix doesn't apply to them.
employees.savedToast: Permissions updated. The effect is immediate: the employee's tabs appear or disappear on their next load.
employees.revokeCasesWarn: Their assigned cases will be inaccessible to them until reassigned.
employees.deactivateBody: Access is cut off immediately; history is preserved.
employees.reactivateBody: The employee will be able to log in again with the same permissions.

audit.title: Audit
audit.sub: Immutable record of all team actions.
audit.encryptedNote: Encrypted fields are never shown in plain text.
audit.viewEntityHistory: View full history of this entity
audit.emptyTitle: Every team action will be recorded here
audit.emptySub: When someone creates, edits or publishes something, it will appear in this log.

config.title: Settings
config.sub: Your organization's data, in one place.
config.generalNote: These values feed the app footer, email templates and contact screens — nothing is hardcoded.
config.coversEmptySub: Cover templates are created in the editor (coming soon).
config.coverInactiveNote: Inactive ones aren't offered in the assembler.
config.coverEditNote: Editing a template doesn't alter already generated cover sheets.
config.termsImmutable: Accepted versions are immutable: a new version is created.
config.termsEmptySub: Create the first version of your terms and conditions.

casos.title: Cases
casos.emptySub: Cases are created when Vanessa converts a lead and the client signs.
casos.phoneHint: We normalize it to international format (+1).
casos.linkBody: Share this link with the client so they can sign their contract.

detail.adminBar: Administrator mode — you have full powers over this case. All your actions are audited.
detail.bannerPaymentPending: Awaiting the down payment — the case will activate once the payment is confirmed.
detail.bannerNoPhase: This case hasn't started its first phase yet.
detail.registerPaymentBody: Confirming the down payment activates the case.
detail.rejectNote: The client will see this reason in their language.
detail.partiesEmpty: This case has no registered parties yet.
detail.tabStubSub: This section arrives in a future phase.

publicSigning.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to continue
publicSigning.accept: I have read the contract and accept its terms. My signature is valid to execute it.
publicSigning.errorBanner: We couldn't record your signature. Please try again.
publicSigning.unavailableTitle: This link is no longer available
publicSigning.unavailableBody: Contact your advisor to receive a new one.
publicSigning.successBody: You'll receive access to your app once your first payment is confirmed.
